sample_values: Max Kepler pops out to first baseman Jake Bauers in foul territory.
Ildemaro Vargas singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Blake Perkins. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. scores.
Nolan Arenado lines out to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Jake Bauers called out on strikes.
Brice Turang singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr. Christian Yelich scores. Jackson Chourio scores. Brice Turang to 2nd.
Jackson Chourio singles on a ground ball to pitcher Ryan Thompson. Blake Perkins scores. Cooper Pratt scores. Christian Yelich to 3rd. Jackson Chourio to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Ryan Thompson.
